supabase.description: Supabase database operations — query tables, manage migrations, inspect schema

vercel.description: Vercel deployments and projects — deploy, list deployments, manage env vars

context7.description: Live documentation lookup — resolve library IDs, query docs for Next.js/React/Supabase APIs

playwright.description: Browser automation and E2E testing via Playwright

firecrawl.description: Web scraping and crawling for documentation and research

sequential-thinking.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning for complex architectural decisions

magic.description: Magic UI components — shadcn/ui compatible React components

memory.description: Persistent memory across AI coding sessions

browserbase.description: Cloud browser sessions for visual E2E testing

_comments.usage: Copy the servers you need to your AI IDE's mcpServers section (e.g. ~/.claude.json, .cursor/mcp.json)
_comments.env_vars: Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with actual values
_comments.rsk_core: supabase + vercel + context7 + playwright are the RSK core MCP servers
_comments.context_warning: Keep under 10 MCPs enabled to preserve context window
